page.title: Templates
page.subtitle: Export and import workspace configurations as portable bundles.
page.empty: You haven't created or imported any template yet.

step2.title: Select what to include
step2.subtitle: Pick the items you want to bundle. You can mix-and-match across categories.
step2.noItems: Nothing to export in this category yet.

step3.title: Review and download
step3.summary: Your bundle will include {{count}} items across {{categoryCount}} categories.
step3.credentialsWarning: Credentials (API keys, tokens, passwords) will NOT be included. Importers will need to reconfigure channels and AI agents.

errors.noSelection: Select at least one item to export.

import.title: Import template
import.subtitle: Drag a .evotpl.zip bundle here, or click to browse.

errors.invalidBundle: The bundle is malformed or corrupted.
errors.unsupportedSchema: Bundle schema version is not supported by this version.
errors.missingFile: Pick a bundle file to import.

warnings.channelRequiresCredentials: Channel imported without credentials. Reconnect it in Settings → Inboxes.
warnings.agentRequiresApiKey: Agent imported without API key. Reconfigure it in Settings → AI Agents.
